definition:
Someone descended from Jair who was a man of the tribe of Judah living at the time of Egypt and Wilderness, first mentioned at Num.32.41; 
 son of: Segub (H7687H)
Group of ya.ir (יָאִיר "Jair" H2971) 
 § Jairite = "descendant of Jair"
1) a descendant of Jair
1a) Ira the Jairite was a priest to David
